- **Q2-B**: B has NEVER been wrong across 8 games. Near-certain. ✅
- **Q3-C**: C has NEVER been wrong across 8 games. Near-certain. ✅

- **Pass and wait**: 75% survival past random elimination × 3 coins max = 2.25 expected coins at best

The strategy is proven and dominant. These are basic arithmetic problems. All players have demonstrated consistent accuracy. The 25% random death risk from passing is far more dangerous than the small residual risk of someone getting simple math wrong. Continuing the winning formula.
